title: Tâi-gí Telex Su-ji̍p-huat
subtitle: Sú-iōng Tâi-gí Telex su-ji̍p-huat phah Tâi-uân-uē (Tâi-lô)

input.label: tsí khuànn-māi:
input.placeholder: Tī tsia phah-jī... (pí-jû: tai[r] → tâi, tâi[f] → tâi-)

howItWorks.title: Tâi-gí Telex Su-ji̍p-huat Suat-bîng
howItWorks.description: Tsit ê su-ji̍p-huat sú-iōng Ua̍t-lâm Telex su-ji̍p-huat ê hong-sik lâi tsú Tâi-lô phing-im ê siann-tiāu. Siann-tiāu hû-hō ē-sái tuì tī guân-im āu-piah a̍h-sī kui-ê im-tsat ê kiat-búe.
